item.title: Totally messed up. YT needs to fix this.

item.title:
Quantum computers can't break your crypto yet.
We want to make sure it stays that way.
We assemble...
item.description:
Quantum computers can't break your crypto yet.
We want to make sure it stays that way.
We assembled a board of researchers from Stanford, UT Austin, and the Ethereum Foundation to figure this out years before it matters.
Their first paper is out now ↓
--- @coinbase | ❤️ 62 | 🔁 7 | 💬 17 | 👁 10106
item.author: @coinbase

item.title: RT @ClementDelangue: I’m hearing there’s renewed lobbying in DC and in state legislatures to ban or ...
item.description:
RT @ClementDelangue: I’m hearing there’s renewed lobbying in DC and in state legislatures to ban or severely restrict open-source.
Like a…
